item.title: Well, there it is. Give back the statue. You done messed up.
item.description: By France 24. https://www.france24.com/en/france/20250316-french-mp-demands-the-us-give-us-back-the-statue-of-liberty It took merely two months that the US "no longer represents the values that led France to offer this statue.".

item.title: What Happened Today #43
item.description: Turning planes around. Erasing scientists. Seizing sacred land. Trump isn’t just making moves—he’s rewriting the rules. A judge halts mid-air deportations. A haunting video exposes Khalil’s arrest. Norms vanish: Fauci erased, monuments threatened, the Kennedy Center put under his thumb. Even law firms aren’t safe. ⚡ Stay informed. Stay engaged. ? Subscribe free → govbrief.today ? Share this. Post it. Keep the spotlight on. #GovBriefToday #Resist2025 1. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/government-shutdown-vote-senate-gop-measure/ 2. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c05mvr3j3yro 3. https://abcnews.go.com/International/wireStory/hamas-release-american-israeli-hostage-truce-agreement-implemented-119825933 4. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/15/trump-deportation-lawsuit-00232121 5. https://apnews.com/video/attorneys-for-mahmoud-khalil-release-video-of-his-arrest-4b05368c85c2418aa04d0d1e1155798d 6. https://www.desertsun.com/story/news/environment/2025/03/15/is-trump-trying-to-eliminate-chuckwalla-sattitla-national-monuments/82456163007/ 7. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/a-mural-of-anthony-fauci-was-meant-to-inspire-staff-then-nih-took-it-down/ar-AA1AYsDt 8. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/15/arts/music/trump-kennedy-center-honors.html 9. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/15/trump-executive-order-paul-weiss-law-firm/82445507007/ 10. https://thehill.com/business/5197164-hundreds-protest-tesla-showrooms-over-musks-doge-work/

item.title: Protest against corruption in Serbia
item.description:
800 000 persons
Protest in front of the Serbian Parliament
After filling up the square in front of the Serbian parliament, protesters have now filled up the Slavija square also
protest against corruption in the history of Serbia
Lot of people
Things are moving
Bucharest standing firm for a pro-european trajectory
Pro European Demonstrations in Rome
Massive Anti-Government protest in Hungary too
Pro European Demonstrations in Romania
The Greater European Union Is this on the way ? ( with Canada and Greenland )
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Sunday's Dumpy
item.description:
2 :: Cartoon Bomb
Mission failed successfully
4 :: She knows what she's doing
The endless elevator at Prague City Hall.
6 :: A useful mom hack!!
This machine carving a wooden ball
8 :: Filling bags of flour
I'm never mowing again...
10 :: Laser varnish removal
Fringe edge
12 :: May be useful
Painting
14 :: smart
3 months of drawing in 36 seconds
16 :: The perfect breakfast does exist
18 :: Motorbike climbing
Lawn Mower in action
20 :: Use wood, not plastic

item.dc:creator: Sweenerd

item.title: Nothing the IRS and French machinery couldn't fix.
item.description:
Bench doing what it is designed to do. Not have a super convenient, extra arm-rest, but keep a person from lying down.
We are expected to believe if we don't allow them to have their fiscal dick-measuring contest, they would "just quit working". They aren't working for money at this point. They are working for ego. If they are the rarified geniuses they are given credit for, they will innovate a way to continue to prove who has the biggest .
Tax the fucking billionaires.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Body painted myself as Silk - MCroft07
item.description:
Silk is my favourite spider!!!! When I saw silk I fell in love with her and went to read her stories! I really liked her because I just felt like I could be her since she looked like me!!! Faq I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. Yes, I have read comic books in my life. No, I will not list every comic book ever existed to prove it I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m about to get a biscoff chocolate I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
Reference, she looks like this
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Christian Nationalist at it again
item.description: Make sure you check out that fine print Yep, it's a real letter. The place does serve food, but they are primarily invested in education through workshops, and they do a number of all ages events.

item.title: Sperm Whale Calf Playfully Swims With A Diver
item.description: Sperm whales' clicks are the loudest animal sounds on Earth, reaching 236 decibels. They use these clicks for echolocation and communication, and their brains are 6 times larger than ours. #the_more_you_know #awesome #animals #nature #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Well, here we go…
item.description: https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp9yv1gnzyvo So, Trumpski invokes WWII era law that allows deportation without due process meant to combat wartime enemy countries from causing harm… Uses it against any Venezuelan suspected of being a Tren gang member and loads up some planes hoping to get them there before anyone catches on. Judge has to rule on Sat in his PJs (not literally) to force the planes in air to turn around. Trump admin defies judge and turns the detainees over to El Salvador anyways. El Salvador literally replies, “oops”. So…now what? I’m sure WH will claim they didn’t receive enough notice but we know that’s bs. Is POTUS defying a judicial stay an impeachable offense? Edit: corrected Venezuela to El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: Kammel

item.description: Trump supporter kicked out of bar claims discrimination even though their political party supports discrimination. Bar - Chatterbox Location - Indianapolis

item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Oh Dam...
item.description: From 2019: https://x.com/marcorubio/status/1105081215261069312 -- Hey Imgur, I need your help. Right now, I’m facing the harsh reality of having nowhere to stay for the next two weeks. It’s overwhelming, but I’m doing everything I can to keep pushing forward with hope. The social insurance payments were meant to kick in, but have been delayed - meaning I haven't eaten for about 4 days now. Last week, I battled a nasty chest infection—so bad that a health center had to keep me for a couple of days. I’m beyond grateful they helped me recover because, honestly, I don’t know how I would’ve made it through alone. But now, I’m in a tough spot again. I need a little extra support to get through this next stretch. If you can spare even a small donation, it would mean the world to me. Every bit helps—whether it’s covering a safe place to sleep, a meal, or just getting through another day. If you can contribute, please check out my bio or DM me. Or, if you prefer, you can donate directly through Ko-Fi here: www.ko-fi.com/skeebeedeebop77 I can’t put into words how much your kindness and generosity mean to me. Thank you for being here, for caring, and for any help you can give. Much love, and be excellent to each other. ❤️ EDIT: It's so easy to point the finger, scream "scammer" and say "well, I just don't believe your story" even after I've tried to explain it. Here is a post I made a while back: https://imgur.com/gallery/TvcLpI4 Yes, I've been homeless for a few months. Far longer than I've been OK with, and more than I ever thought I would be. I'm educated. I'm smart. I'm a hard worker. I HATE BEGGING and my pride has taken more hits than I can count. I'm shit down on my luck and just waiting to bounce back. I'm not a liar. I'm not a cheat, and I'm not a scammer. I have no issue with explaining my story and I understand I'm the one asking for help but I just ask for some kindness instead of some of the abuse I've been getting by DMs. You know who you are.
item.dc:creator: Skeebeedeebop

item.title: Orange Juice Futures Crashing since Trump Took Office
item.description: Thing I just noticed... Orange Juice futures (OJ=F) are down 46% since Trump took office. Showing the last 5 yrs, there's a dramatic decline once Trump started. Just kind of funny. https://finance.yahoo.com/chart/OJ%3DF
item.dc:creator: RummageSaleBubbler

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1302 (Wizardposting X)
item.description:
I may have fallen out of bed and knocked down my bedside table last night, but I'm still here. Let's conjure this bread.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "beep" (said while preening my mustache) ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
